completed_sprints.name: Sprint 1 — Consolidate & Ship
completed_sprints.notes: 153 tests, structured logging, benchmarks, merged to main

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 2 — Docker Architecture (Pi5)
completed_sprints.notes: 204 domains in 8.5 min (9x improvement). Subfinder batch enrichment, local CT database, observability stack. 217 tests.

completed_sprints.name: Sprint 3 — Level 1 Pipeline (3.0-3.4)
completed_sprints.notes: Results API, consent management, Level 1 scanners (Nuclei/WPScan/CMSeek), finding interpreter, message composer, client memory, digital twin, mobile console. 482 tests. Shipped 5 days early.

milestones.name: Level 1 scan types (Sprint 3, Increment 3.2)
milestones.notes: WPScan (Redis sidecar), CMSeek (git clone), Nuclei (Go binary + 12,763 templates). All verified on Pi5 ARM64.

milestones.name: Client Memory + Remediation workflow (Sprint 3, Increment 3.4)
milestones.notes: Delta detection, remediation state machine, 56 tests. PR #13 merged.

milestones.name: Docker smoke test (Sprint 3.5 — Hardening)
milestones.notes: Verify Go binaries survive pip install. Prevent httpx-style overwrites.

milestones.name: Export script tests (Sprint 3.5 — Hardening)
milestones.notes: Test CVR enrichment, contactable field, CSV schema, graceful fallbacks.

milestones.name: Pin dependencies (Sprint 3.5 — Hardening)
milestones.notes: Pin CMSeek commit hash, Nuclei v3.7.1. Install openpyxl on Pi5.

milestones.name: Telegram delivery (Sprint 4)
milestones.notes: Bot setup, human-in-the-loop approval, message delivery.

milestones.name: Client onboarding — first 5 Vejle businesses (Sprint 4)
milestones.notes: Real clients, real scans, real messages. Free first month.

milestones.name: Tailscale remote access (Sprint 4)
milestones.notes: Remote console, Grafana, Dozzle access. Soft dependency — doesn't block pilot.

external_deadlines.name: Startup Denmark application
external_deadlines.notes: Benefits from pilot data but never blocks product roadmap. Lawyer meeting week of 2026-03-31.

external_deadlines.name: NCC-DK grant application
external_deadlines.notes: Requires CVR from SIRI approval. Product continues regardless.

pipeline_run.notes: httpx fixed, tools/ in image. Twin enrichment pending re-run verification.

next_actions: Verify twin enrichment works on next Pi5 run

follow_ups: CT backfill from crt.sh (one-time, before next production run)
